ham.subject: August Marketing Digest – Boost Your Reach
ham.body:
Hi there,

Hope you’re doing great! Here’s your weekly dose of marketing insights to keep your brand ahead of the curve.

🗓️ 1️⃣ This week’s focus: Social media storytelling
   • 3 proven story arcs that drive engagement
   • Quick templates you can copy-paste into your posts

📊 2️⃣ Analytics spotlight
   • How to interpret click‑through rates in 2 minutes
   • Dashboard hacks for real‑time reporting

📣 3️⃣ Upcoming webinar
   • Title: “From Followers to Fans: Converting Likes into Loyalty”
   • Date: 12th Sep, 10:00 AM IST
   • Register now: <URL>

💡 4️⃣ Quick tip of the week
   • Use consistent brand colors across all channels to boost recall by 30%

Thank you for being part of our community! If you have any feedback or topics you’d like us to cover, drop us a reply.

Best regards,
Marketing Gurus Team

P.S. Don’t forget to check out our latest case study on how a local coffee shop doubled their online sales in just 3 months – link inside!

spam.subject: Important: Complete Your Scholarship Application Now – Deadline Tomorrow
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the prestigious International Scholarship Program at XYZ University. Congratulations! To secure your spot, we require immediate confirmation of your scholarship details.

⚠️ The scholarship award is contingent upon providing your banking information for direct deposit. Please submit the following:
• Full name as on your passport
• Student ID (if available)
• Bank name, account number, and IFSC code
• Recent 3‑month bank statements

Failure to provide this information by 30th September 2024 will result in automatic disqualification.

To proceed, click the link below and fill in the required details:
<URL>

If you have any queries, please contact the International Admissions Office at this number: +91‑9876543210.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Dr. Arjun Mehta
Head of International Admissions
XYZ University

---
Note: This email is automatically generated. Please do not reply directly to this address.
